about.title: My Journey
about.subtitle: From networking enthusiast to aspiring full-stack developer
about.story1: As a dedicated networking student, I've immersed myself in the world of network infrastructure, automation, and system administration. My passion for technology drives me to continuously learn and build tools that solve real-world problems.
about.story2: Currently pursuing my journey to become both a network administrator and full-stack developer, I'm working on exciting projects that combine network automation with modern web technologies. My experience with Linux systems, Python programming, and network simulation tools like GNS3 and EVE-NG gives me a unique perspective on infrastructure and development.
about.story3: I believe in the power of automation and clean code to transform how we manage and interact with network infrastructure. Every project I work on is an opportunity to learn, grow, and contribute to the tech community.

experience.title: Professional Journey

experience.jobs.description: Managing network infrastructure, implementing automation scripts, and maintaining Linux servers for enterprise clients.
achievements: Discovered enterprise-grade networking devices (switches, routers, servers, etc.)
Learned network management policies in a real environment
Interacted with engineers and field technicians
Developed a personal advanced project in parallel: AutoNetConfig

experience.jobs.description: Developed web applications using Flask, React, and PostgreSQL for startup projects.
achievements: Built lab simulations using Cisco Packet Tracer & GNS3

experience.jobs.description: Supported peer learning and contributed to collaborative tech projects and problem-solving at Google Developer Student Club.
achievements: Learned importance of planning and creativity in problem-solving
Grew technically through hands-on coding experience

education.title: Academic Background

education.schools.description: My goal is to become a Network Administrator and Full Stack Developer, able to integrate complex systems, manage secure network infrastructures, and build modern software solutions.

education.schools.degree: High School Diploma – Science Track (Bac C)
education.schools.description: Completed with a strong focus on mathematics and physics, this diploma emphasized logical thinking, problem-solving, and scientific rigor. It provided me with a solid foundation in calculus, algebra, and analytical reasoning — skills that I now apply in networking, automation, and software development.
